description_long: This nightclub features a boxy, modern structure with a dark, sleek exterior accented by neon lighting and digital displays. The front facade is adorned with illuminated signage reading 'GUNS & AMMO' and a stylized gun graphic, suggesting a cyberpunk or themed venue. Large, tinted panels and a prominent, glowing blue fixture on one side add to the futuristic aesthetic. The building's surfaces are primarily dark, with hints of blue, purple, and red lighting effects that create a moody, nightlife atmosphere. The entrance is recessed, flanked by columns and digital panels, and appears to be the main point of access. The overall design is minimalistic yet visually striking, with an emphasis on bold lighting and signage.
description: A dark, boxy nightclub with neon signage, digital displays, and a futuristic, cyberpunk-inspired facade. The entrance is recessed and highlighted by glowing blue and red lighting.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, neon 'GUNS & AMMO' signage, a stylized gun graphic, and digital panels with blue lighting.
description_view_1: The rear view is mostly featureless, dominated by a smooth, dark surface with minimal lighting or detail.
description_view_2: The left side view displays a large, dark panel with subtle blue and purple lighting effects, lacking significant architectural features.
description_view_3: The right side view features a similar dark panel with blue lighting, and a prominent glowing blue fixture near the front corner.
attribute_signage: The front facade features illuminated signage with the text 'GUNS & AMMO' in bold, red neon letters, accompanied by a stylized gun graphic above the entrance. Additional digital panels and glowing blue fixtures enhance the visual impact.
attribute_lighting_fixtures: blue LED fixture on the front-right corner
digital display panels on the front facade
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is recessed into the front facade, framed by two columns and digital panels. It is wide and rectangular, with a dark, possibly glass or metal door, and is highlighted by neon and LED lighting. The entrance is visually prominent due to the surrounding signage and lighting effects.
